title: Repetition Artist
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A forensic timeline-analyst for the FBI notices that the same three-second micro-expression sequence appears in the confession footage of every serial killer she's worked on—as if someone taught them all the same tell.
long_description: A forensic timeline-analyst for the FBI notices that the same three-second micro-expression sequence appears in the confession footage of every serial killer she's worked on—as if someone taught them all the same tell.
